rules.rule: Aggregation services must fan out calls to multiple orchestration services in sequence or in parallel.
Aggregation services must expose a single entry-point method that triggers the aggregated workflow.
Aggregation services must depend only on orchestration services (or processing services where no orchestration exists).
Aggregation services must return results only; they must not perform data transformation or enforce business rules.
Every behavior must have a failing test written before the implementation (TDD).
All test inputs and outputs must be randomized; expected variables must use DeepClone().
